Poem: contains long poem "Europe" divided into 111 numbered sections

front: Poem: describes poetry as "the extreme austerity of an almost empty mind / Colliding with the lush, Rousseau-like foliage of its desire to communicate"
back: And Ut Pictura Poesis Is Her Name (John Ashbery)

front: Author: co-edited Roussel-inspired literary journal Locus Solus with Kenneth Koch and James Schuyler
Author: drew from death of younger brother Richard in "The History of My Life" — "Once upon a time there were two brothers / Then there was only one: myself"
Author: Ben Lerner's Leaving the Atocha Station titled for one of his poems
Author: its protagonist carries his Collected Poems
